title: Run crypto correctness and tamper tests
description: Execute the project's cryptographic tests and report round-trip, tamper-rejection, and parameter checks.
body: Use when validating a cryptographic change. Actions: detect and run the project's test suite, ensuring it covers encrypt/decrypt round-trips, tamper rejection (a flipped ciphertext or tag byte must fail verification), wrong-key rejection, and known-answer test vectors where available; report pass/fail per case. Do not treat a passing round-trip alone as evidence of security without the tamper and wrong-key cases. This skill exposes capability only and must not run against production keys or data without runtime permission. Validation signals include tamper and wrong-key tests failing closed and KAT vectors matching. Risk boundary: if tamper tests are missing, report the change as unverified rather than secure, and recommend adding negative tests before release.
